machines.title: Constellation
machines.blurb: A drifting field of stars. Draw lines between them, star by star, until the whole sky is joined into one constellation — then a larger sky appears.

machines.title: Orbit
machines.blurb: Slingshot worlds around a star and keep them looping in stable orbits. Capture three at once to complete a whole solar system.

machines.title: Echo
machines.blurb: Watch the lights sing a melody, then echo it back in order. Each round adds a note — how long a memory can you hold?

machines.title: Skein
machines.blurb: A tangle of threads and knots. Drag the knots until nothing crosses — every board can be made calm.

machines.title: Embers
machines.blurb: A drawing canvas made of living embers. Sketch with light, or drop in a photo to trace its edges. Your work saves itself on this device — come back and keep going.

machines.title: Wisp
machines.blurb: You are a spark of light in a dark maze that only your glow reveals. Feel your way to the ember — each maze you solve, the next grows larger.

machines.title: Prism
machines.blurb: A beam of light, a grid of crystals, and a handful of mirrors. Bend the beam so it passes through every crystal at once — each puzzle you solve, the next grows.
